join_order.notes: sub_adsh_hash is 4MB — fully LLC-resident. Probe num after uom+null filters. Post-probe filter: sic BETWEEN 4000 AND 4999 (~4.1%) → ~1.38M survive. Read sub_row_id, sub_sic, sub_cik.

tag_pair_hash is 64MB (exceeds L3=44MB but madvise WILLNEED reduces latency). Composite key: (num.tag_code, num.ver_code). Post-probe filter: abstract==0 (~98%) → ~1.35M survive. Read tlabel_code for GROUP BY.

pre_triple_hash is 512MB (>> L3=44MB). madvise(MADV_WILLNEED) started FIRST in concurrent prefetch block. Composite key: (num.adsh_code, num.tag_code, num.ver_code). Get first_row_id, scan forward in sorted pre while adsh/tag/ver match, check stmt_code==eq_code. Post-filter: ~11% → ~148K survive. Read stmt_code for GROUP BY (always eq_code).

filters.applied_at: post probe_pre_triple_hash (scan forward in sorted pre)

data_structures.sub_join: pre-built mmap open-addressing hash (sub_adsh_hash, 4MB, fits LLC). Key: int32 adsh_code. Slot: SubADSHSlot {int32 adsh_code, int32 row_id, int32 _pad0, int32 _pad1}. Sentinel: adsh_code==INT32_MIN. Hash: hash_int32(adsh_code).
data_structures.tag_join: pre-built mmap open-addressing hash (tag_pair_hash, 64MB). Key: (int32 tag_code, int32 ver_code). Slot: TagPairSlot {int32 tag_code, int32 ver_code, int32 row_id, int32 _pad}. Sentinel: tag_code==INT32_MIN. Hash: hash_combine(hash_int32(tag_code), hash_int32(ver_code)).
data_structures.pre_join: pre-built mmap open-addressing hash (pre_triple_hash, 512MB). Key: (int32 adsh_code, int32 tag_code, int32 ver_code). Slot: PreTripleSlot {int32 adsh_code, int32 tag_code, int32 ver_code, int32 row_id (first in sorted pre)}. Sentinel: adsh_code==INT32_MIN. Hash: hash_combine(hash_combine(hash_int32(adsh_code), hash_int32(tag_code)), hash_int32(ver_code)). Multi-value: scan pre forward from first_row_id while keys match.
data_structures.aggregation: thread-local open-addressing hash map per thread. AGG_CAP = next_pow2(2000*2) = 4096 slots. Key struct: {int32_t sic; int32_t tlabel_code; int16_t stmt_code; int16_t _pad} (12 bytes, C15: all GROUP BY dims). Value: {int64_t sum_cents; int64_t count; std::unordered_set<int32_t> cik_set}. Sentinel: sic==INT32_MIN. Total thread-local memory: 64 * 4096 * ~40 bytes (excl. cik_set heap) ≈ 10MB << LLC (44MB). Merge strategy: sequential merge (T*G=128K, small enough).

parallelism.pattern: omp parallel for schedule(dynamic, 100000) over num rows. Each thread: filter num locally → probe sub/tag/pre indexes (read-only) → accumulate into thread-local aggregation hash map. After barrier: sequential merge of thread-local maps into global result map.
parallelism.concurrent_prefetch: omp parallel sections at startup: section1: madvise(pre_triple_hash, 512MB, MADV_WILLNEED); section2: madvise(tag_pair_hash, 64MB, MADV_WILLNEED); section3: madvise(sub_adsh_hash, 4MB, MADV_WILLNEED) — P27: concurrent madvise for all large index files

indexes.purpose: join_lookup: num.adsh_code → sub.row_id for sic and cik retrieval
indexes.header_parse: uint32_t sub_cap = *(uint32_t*)sub_raw; uint32_t sub_mask = sub_cap - 1; const SubADSHSlot* sub_ht = (const SubADSHSlot*)(sub_raw + 4); — C32: at function scope

indexes.purpose: join_lookup: (num.tag_code, num.ver_code) → tag.row_id for abstract and tlabel_code retrieval
indexes.header_parse: uint32_t tph_cap = *(uint32_t*)tag_raw; uint32_t tph_mask = tph_cap - 1; const TagPairSlot* tph_ht = (const TagPairSlot*)(tag_raw + 4); — C32: at function scope

indexes.purpose: join_lookup: (num.adsh_code, num.tag_code, num.ver_code) → first pre.row_id; scan forward in sorted pre checking stmt_code==eq_code
indexes.header_parse: uint32_t pth_cap = *(uint32_t*)pre_raw; uint32_t pth_mask = pth_cap - 1; const PreTripleSlot* pth_ht = (const PreTripleSlot*)(pre_raw + 4); — C32: at function scope

aggregation_key.struct: struct AggKey { int32_t sic; int32_t tlabel_code; int16_t stmt_code; int16_t _pad; }
aggregation_key.note: C15: ALL three GROUP BY columns (sic, tlabel_code, stmt_code) must be in key. stmt_code is always eq_code but must still be included.

aggregation_values.sum_cents: int64_t — C29 HARD CONSTRAINT: accumulate as llround(v * 100.0), output as printf("%lld.%02lld", sc/100, llabs(sc%100))
aggregation_values.cik_set: std::unordered_set<int32_t> per group — for COUNT(DISTINCT s.cik). Merge thread-local sets by iterating and inserting.

output.tiebreaker: sic ASC then tlabel_code ASC — C33: stable deterministic ordering for LIMIT 500

format.tlabel: double-quoted string — C31: printf("\"%s\"", tlabel_dict[tlabel_code].c_str()) — tlabel frequently contains commas

dict_loading.uom: load sf3.gendb/num/uom_dict.txt → find usd_code where dict[i]=="USD"
dict_loading.stmt: load sf3.gendb/pre/stmt_dict.txt → find eq_code where dict[i]=="EQ"
dict_loading.tlabel: load sf3.gendb/tag/tlabel_dict.txt → decode tlabel_code at output time

prefetch.strategy: concurrent madvise MADV_WILLNEED at program start using omp parallel sections — P27
priority_order: pre_triple_hash (512MB) — highest priority, largest, start first

correctness_notes: C9: AGG_CAP = next_pow2(2000*2) = 4096 — sized to FILTERED group cardinality not raw table size
C15: AggKey includes sic + tlabel_code + stmt_code — ALL three GROUP BY columns
C20: Use std::fill for sentinel initialization, NEVER memset for INT32_MIN sentinel
C24: ALL hash table probes use bounded for-loop (probe < cap), never unbounded while
C29: SUM/AVG accumulate as int64_t cents via llround(v*100.0) — HARD CONSTRAINT
C31: double-quote ALL string output (tlabel contains commas, will break CSV)
C32: ALL index header variables (cap, mask, ht pointer) declared at function scope before any loop
C33: stable tiebreaker sic ASC + tlabel_code ASC appended to ORDER BY comparator
